description_long: This is a compact mechanical keyboard with a striking gradient color scheme across its keycaps, transitioning from deep reds and oranges on one side to blues and purples on the other. The keyboard features a low-profile, rectangular black chassis with a thin gold accent line running along the front edge. The keycaps are arranged in a standard staggered layout, with a long, light gray spacebar centrally positioned. The keys are sculpted and appear to be made of plastic, with each row displaying a distinct color block. The keyboard lacks a visible numpad, suggesting a tenkeyless or 65% layout. No visible branding or cable is present, and the surface finish appears smooth and matte.
description: A compact, colorful mechanical keyboard with a gradient of keycap colors and a sleek black chassis accented by a gold line. The layout is tenkeyless or 65%, with a prominent gray spacebar and no visible branding or cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gradient of colored keycaps and the gold accent line on the black chassis.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered rows of keycaps and the keyboard's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back row of keycaps and the long gray spacebar in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gradient from purple to red and the keyboard's compact depth.
